howItWorks.intro: This mining profitability calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Daily Revenue = Hashrate × Coins per TH/day × Coin Price
Daily Electricity = (Watts ÷ 1000) × 24 hours × Rate per kWh
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: Is crypto mining still profitable?
faq.answer: It depends on electricity costs, hardware efficiency, and coin price. At $0.05/kWh or less, mining can be profitable. Above $0.10/kWh, only the most efficient machines profit. Always run the numbers.

faq.question: What affects mining profitability most?
faq.answer: Electricity cost is the biggest factor, followed by hardware efficiency (hashrate per watt), network difficulty, and coin price. A 50% drop in electricity cost can turn a loss into profit.

faq.question: How long does it take for a mining rig to pay for itself?
faq.answer: Typical breakeven is 12-24 months under favorable conditions. If breakeven exceeds 18 months, the risk increases as difficulty adjustments and price changes could eliminate profits.

faq.question: Is the Mining Profitability Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cryptocurrency and blockchain formulas trusted by crypto investors and traders. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Mining Profitability Calculator?
sections.body: The Mining Profitability Calculator is a free online tool designed for crypto investors and traders who need quick, accurate calculations in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. By entering your hashrate, power consumption, electricity rate, you get instant results including daily revenue, daily electricity cost, daily profit. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting daily revenue right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cryptocurrency and blockchain, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by crypto investors and traders worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to evaluate your crypto portfolio with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your hashrate and need to find the right daily revenue. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Hashrate (TH/s)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your hashrate — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: power consumption, electricity rate, coins earned per th/day, coin price, hardware cost. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your daily revenue, daily electricity cost, daily profit. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your hashrate before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both daily revenue and daily electricity cost — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to evaluate your crypto portfolio.
If you're unsure about your hardware cost, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
